message:
chore: remove stale .snap.new test artifacts and ignore future ones

- Remove four orphaned .snap.new snapshot review files from tracking
- Add *.snap.new to .gitignore to prevent insta review artifacts from being committed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -47,3 +47,6 @@ storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
 .beads/*.pre_repair_*
 .beads/*.repair_candidate_*
 .beads/*.bak-corrupt
+
+# Snapshot test review artifacts (regenerated by insta)
+*.snap.new
